Therefore, even though emerging research might suggest future development, current published literature lacks confirmation linking MK-1602 to CGRP antagonism. Given that definitive documentation supporting its classification as a CGRP antagonist is missing from the provided references, the safest inference remains that it is not confirmed as such.
